name: Competitor Watch
summary: Monitors competitor websites and feeds for changes and news; produces a weekly briefing.
description: Tracks a list of competitor URLs (blogs, news, product pages) and produces a structured briefing of changes, new posts, or notable updates. Uses configured feeds and optional diff signals. Output is markdown suitable for internal distribution.

inputs.description: List of competitor URLs and optional keywords

safety.description: Only fetches configured URLs; no scraping of authenticated or private pages without explicit config.

steps: Set COMPETITOR_URLS and optional COMPETITOR_FEEDS, KEYWORDS, OUTPUT_DIR

execution.notes: Runtime fetches and compares; template is declarative only.
